summary: Iter35 internal-transfer detector: all backend + frontend flows validated end-to-end. Main agent's regression harness passes as a script (not pytest-compatible due to module-level code + -n 2 xdist double-collection, but works standalone). Added new pytest suite covering multi-tenant auth (403), dry_run/date_since flags, live-run persistence, and post-sync hook wiring — all 6 tests pass. Frontend Playwright: Detect transfers button renders next to filter tabs, click triggers dry-run scan (POST /detect-transfers → 200), modal preview opens with correct heading + pair rows, Apply books both legs (2nd POST → 200), toast confirms 'Booked 1 internal transfer (2 rows moved to the transfer clearing account).', modal closes. Real 704 LLC $13,200 pair confirmed intact + booked to 3200 Inter-Account Transfer equity account (pre-existing after main agent's run — no drift from testing). Equity account preserved for future syncs. All seed data cleaned.

minor.issue: test_iter35_transfer_detect.py is module-level script code, not real pytest — runs twice under xdist -n 2 (each worker collects the module and re-executes the top-level assertions), causing spurious failures on the 2nd execution because seeded rows are already flipped. Standalone `python test_iter35_transfer_detect.py` works. Recommend wrapping in a `def test_*():` function or moving to a scripts/ folder.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Refactor test_iter35_transfer_detect.py into a pytest function so it's collectable & idempotent under -n 2 xdist — the assertions all pass on a fresh run but the second worker's re-collection double-executes the module and trips because the first pass already booked the pairs.
critical_code_review_comments: detect_transfer_pairs correctly gated by require_company(user, cid) — multi-tenant confirmed via 403 for client2@axiom.ai against 704 LLC.

Post-sync hook (sync_tasks.py:231-237) wraps detect_transfer_pairs in try/except pass — silent failure is deliberate per the code comment, but be aware this masks real errors. Consider logger.warning at minimum for observability.
Frontend applyTransfers toast copy: 'Booked N internal transfer(s) (M rows moved…)' — copy matches spec. Confirmed live.
Idempotency verified: rerunning detect on already-booked pairs returns updated=0.
seed_data_creation: Temporary during testing only — all __XFER_TEST / __XFER_EP_TEST / __XFER_SYNC_HOOK / __UI_XFER seeds and their bank accounts (codes 15xx/16xx/17xx/18xx/19xx/1591/1592) were fully cleaned up. 704 LLC real $13,200 pair state unchanged (was already booked before testing). Equity account 3200 preserved as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iter35_transfer_endpoint.py — covers auth, dry_run/date_since flags, persistence, and the sync-hook wiring. The older test_iter35_transfer_detect.py is a script (run with `python`, not pytest). Frontend flow uses `pro@axiom.ai / pro123` → open 704 LLC card → Transactions tab → data-testid='detect-transfers-btn'. Session-cookie state does NOT persist across mcp_browser_automation calls; each run must re-login via input.nth(0)/nth(1) + button:has-text('Sign in').
